testResults.name: C:\Users\osama\OneDrive\سطح المكتب\Whale_Store\.claude\worktrees\gracious-colden\__tests__\uiux.guideline.test.js

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + confirm → CONFIRMED (seller)
assertionResults.title: PENDING + confirm → CONFIRMED (seller)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + cancel → CANCELLED (buyer)
assertionResults.title: PENDING + cancel → CANCELLED (buyer)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + cancel → CANCELLED (seller)
assertionResults.title: PENDING + cancel → CANCELLED (seller)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine CONFIRMED + ship + trackingNumber → SHIPPED (seller)
assertionResults.title: CONFIRMED + ship + trackingNumber → SHIPPED (seller)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine CONFIRMED + cancel → CANCELLED (buyer)
assertionResults.title: CONFIRMED + cancel → CANCELLED (buyer)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine SHIPPED + deliver → COMPLETED (buyer)
assertionResults.title: SHIPPED + deliver → COMPLETED (buyer)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine SHIPPED + dispute → DISPUTED (buyer)
assertionResults.title: SHIPPED + dispute → DISPUTED (buyer)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine DELIVERED + deliver → COMPLETED (buyer)
assertionResults.title: DELIVERED + deliver → COMPLETED (buyer)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine DELIVERED + dispute → DISPUTED (buyer)
assertionResults.title: DELIVERED + dispute → DISPUTED (buyer)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine DISPUTED + resolve(complete) → COMPLETED (admin)
assertionResults.title: DISPUTED + resolve(complete) → COMPLETED (admin)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine DISPUTED + resolve(cancel) → CANCELLED (admin)
assertionResults.title: DISPUTED + resolve(cancel) → CANCELLED (admin)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine DISPUTED + resolve(invalid) → throws INVALID_RESOLUTION (admin)
assertionResults.title: DISPUTED + resolve(invalid) → throws INVALID_RESOLUTION (admin)

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine COMPLETED + cancel → throws INVALID_TRANSITION
assertionResults.title: COMPLETED + cancel → throws INVALID_TRANSITION

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine CANCELLED + confirm → throws INVALID_TRANSITION
assertionResults.title: CANCELLED + confirm → throws INVALID_TRANSITION

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + ship → throws INVALID_TRANSITION
assertionResults.title: PENDING + ship → throws INVALID_TRANSITION

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + dispute → throws INVALID_TRANSITION
assertionResults.title: PENDING + dispute → throws INVALID_TRANSITION

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine SHIPPED + confirm → throws INVALID_TRANSITION
assertionResults.title: SHIPPED + confirm → throws INVALID_TRANSITION

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + confirm → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is buyer
assertionResults.title: PENDING + confirm → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is buyer

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine SHIPPED + deliver → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is seller
assertionResults.title: SHIPPED + deliver → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is seller

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine SHIPPED + dispute → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is seller
assertionResults.title: SHIPPED + dispute → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is seller

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine DISPUTED + resolve → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is not admin
assertionResults.title: DISPUTED + resolve → throws UNAUTHORIZED_ACTOR when actor is not admin

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine CONFIRMED + ship without trackingNumber → throws MISSING_TRACKING
assertionResults.title: CONFIRMED + ship without trackingNumber → throws MISSING_TRACKING

assertionResults.fullName: Order State Machine PENDING + cancel without reason → throws MISSING_REASON
assertionResults.title: PENDING + cancel without reason → throws MISSING_REASON
